{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR / Admin Associate",
  "description": "TAG Energy is an integrated service company offering a comprehensive range of oilfield products and support services in the Nigerian Oil and Gas Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR / Admin Associate

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki / Ajah Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Correspondence with external parties on selectedtransactions/projects
	Oversee scheduled management across all TAG Facilities.
	Work closely with the hiring managers to interview candidates for open roles
	Coordinate monthly town hall activities.
	Draft MOUs, Contract, and Addendum
	Conduct reference and background checks on new hires
	Oversee front desk/Admin operations
	Represent the company at collective bargaining agreement meetings
	Handle vendor registration with new clients
	Provide continuous support to all employees.
	Assist in coordinating HR projects (meetings, training, surveys etc.) and take minutes.
	Provide clerical and administrative support to the HR Lead.
	Perform other duties as may be assigned by the HR Lead.


General Requirements


	Minimum of a first degree from a reputable university
	A background in Law will be most preferred.
	Minimum of 3 + years of proven experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite Applications (PowerPoint, Excel, Word, and Outlook), Networking Applications, and web-based applications
	Strong written and oral communication skills with the ability to influence all levels of the organization and multicultural/international environment
	Demonstrated integrity, confidentiality, and approachability
	Must be teachable and ready to learn.
	Must be a resident of Lekki/Ajah and its environs.


Benefits
Accommodation provided

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruit4talents1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

  },

HR / Admin Associate Job at TAG Energy




        
    

        
        TAG Energy is an integrated service company offering a comprehensive range of oilfield products and support services in the Nigerian Oil and Gas Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR / Admin Associate

Job Location: Lekki / Ajah Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Correspondence with external parties on selectedtransactions/projects
	Oversee scheduled management across all TAG Facilities.
	Work closely with the hiring managers to interview candidates for open roles
	Coordinate monthly town hall activities.
	Draft MOUs, Contract, and Addendum
	Conduct reference and background checks on new hires
	Oversee front desk/Admin operations
	Represent the company at collective bargaining agreement meetings
	Handle vendor registration with new clients
	Provide continuous support to all employees.
	Assist in coordinating HR projects (meetings, training, surveys etc.) and take minutes.
	Provide clerical and administrative support to the HR Lead.
	Perform other duties as may be assigned by the HR Lead.


General Requirements


	Minimum of a first degree from a reputable university
	A background in Law will be most preferred.
	Minimum of 3 + years of proven experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite Applications (PowerPoint, Excel, Word, and Outlook), Networking Applications, and web-based applications
	Strong written and oral communication skills with the ability to influence all levels of the organization and multicultural/international environment
	Demonstrated integrity, confidentiality, and approachability
	Must be teachable and ready to learn.
	Must be a resident of Lekki/Ajah and its environs.


Benefits
Accommodation provided

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Loan & Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Gabs Cooperative is a financial institution dedicated to empowering SMEs, public servants, and civil servants with easy access to affordable loans. With a focus on financial inclusion and growth, we offer low-interest-rate loans tailored to meet diverse financial needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan &amp; Marketing Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Central Business District, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for a dedicated Loan &amp; Marketing Officer to join our team.
	This role is perfect for a detail-oriented professional who can balance meticulous loan processing with a proactive approach to business development and customer relationship management.


Responsibilities


	Processing loan applications and documentation within specified limits.
	Maintain and update account records to ensure accuracy and compliance.
	Develop referral networks and explore alternate channels to enhance customer acquisition.
	Cross-sell products and services to achieve sales targets.
	Build and maintain trust relationships with customers to enhance loyalty and satisfaction throughout the underwriting process.
	Ensure compliance with lending laws, regulations, and company policies.
	Marketing our various products.


Requirements


	Minimum educational qualification: SSCE, HND, and B.Sc Degree
	Strong communication and negotiation skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Must be based in Abuja.


Salary
N250,000 - N450,000 / Month.

Additional Benefits:
Pension, 13th Month Allowance, Leave Allowance, Health insurance and professional growth opportunities.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter&nbsp;to:&nbsp;recruitment@gabscoopeartive.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

    "name": "Gabs Cooperative"
    
  },

Loan & Marketing Officer Job at Gabs Cooperative




        
    

        
        Gabs Cooperative is a financial institution dedicated to empowering SMEs, public servants, and civil servants with easy access to affordable loans. With a focus on financial inclusion and growth, we offer low-interest-rate loans tailored to meet diverse financial needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan & Marketing Officer

Job Location: Central Business District, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a dedicated Loan & Marketing Officer to join our team.
	This role is perfect for a detail-oriented professional who can balance meticulous loan processing with a proactive approach to business development and customer relationship management.


Responsibilities


	Processing loan applications and documentation within specified limits.
	Maintain and update account records to ensure accuracy and compliance.
	Develop referral networks and explore alternate channels to enhance customer acquisition.
	Cross-sell products and services to achieve sales targets.
	Build and maintain trust relationships with customers to enhance loyalty and satisfaction throughout the underwriting process.
	Ensure compliance with lending laws, regulations, and company policies.
	Marketing our various products.


Requirements


	Minimum educational qualification: SSCE, HND, and B.Sc Degree
	Strong communication and negotiation skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Must be based in Abuja.


Salary
N250,000 - N450,000 / Month.

Additional Benefits:
Pension, 13th Month Allowance, Leave Allowance, Health insurance and professional growth opportunities.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Global Aluminium Industries is a manufacturer of aluminum building components. The company is engaged in manufacturing and marketing building products including aluminium doors, windows, railings and suspended ceilings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are actively seeking an experienced Financial Accountant to join our team.
	As a Financial Accountant, you will be responsible for monitoring all financial data, preparing accurate statements, and ensuring compliance with legal regulations.


Responsibilities


	Gather and monitor financial data (e.g. sales revenues and liabilities)
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual statements (balance sheets and income statements)
	Forecast costs and revenues
	Manage tax payments
	Organize internal audits
	Prepare budgets (for the entire company and by department)
	Monitor and report on accounting discrepancies
	Conduct detailed risk analyses to assess potential investments
	Analyze financial trends
	Perform month-end and year-end close processes


Requirements and skills


	Proven work experience as a Financial Accountant or similar role
	Advanced knowledge of MS Excel and accounting software
	In-depth understanding of business bookkeeping procedures
	Solid knowledge of accounting regulations
	Excellent math skills with an attention to detail
	Time-management abilities
	Confidentiality.


Salary
N160,000 - N230,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates&nbsp;should send their CV to:&nbsp;globalaluminiumindustries@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Financial Accountant Job at Global Aluminium Industries




        
    

        
        Global Aluminium Industries is a manufacturer of aluminum building components. The company is engaged in manufacturing and marketing building products including aluminium doors, windows, railings and suspended ceilings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are actively seeking an experienced Financial Accountant to join our team.
	As a Financial Accountant, you will be responsible for monitoring all financial data, preparing accurate statements, and ensuring compliance with legal regulations.


Responsibilities


	Gather and monitor financial data (e.g. sales revenues and liabilities)
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual statements (balance sheets and income statements)
	Forecast costs and revenues
	Manage tax payments
	Organize internal audits
	Prepare budgets (for the entire company and by department)
	Monitor and report on accounting discrepancies
	Conduct detailed risk analyses to assess potential investments
	Analyze financial trends
	Perform month-end and year-end close processes


Requirements and skills


	Proven work experience as a Financial Accountant or similar role
	Advanced knowledge of MS Excel and accounting software
	In-depth understanding of business bookkeeping procedures
	Solid knowledge of accounting regulations
	Excellent math skills with an attention to detail
	Time-management abilities
	Confidentiality.


Salary
N160,000 - N230,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Emobella Engineering Nigeria Limited is an indigenous mechanical and electrical engineering service company with core competency in Metal Fabrication, Pipe Fitting and Welding, Instrumentation and Control, Pressure Vessel Inspection, Safety Valve Testing and Certification, and Plant Equipment Installation and Non-destructive Test of Vessel and Pipelines. We are a full-fledged professional engineering company located in the heart of Lagos State to provide services that meet all our clients&rsquo; engineering service needs at the same time, providing quality services while minimizing cost for our clients without compromising safety.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos&nbsp;&nbsp;
Job Type: Full-time

Job&nbsp;Description


	We are a dynamic team specializing in Metal Fabrication, Piping, and Technical Procurement.
	We need an intelligent, proactive Sourcing Officer to help us manage supplier relationships, optimize costs, and ensure our projects are fueled by the best resources in the industry.


Requirements
What we are looking for:


	Education: B.Sc / HND in Procurement, Supply Chain, or Business Admin.
	Experience: 2&ndash;3 years in procurement, sourcing, or logistics.
	Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Excel and experience with ERP systems (SAP/Oracle).
	Location: Must be based in Ogba or environs (Lagos Mainland precisely).

Procurement Officer Job at Emobella Engineering Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Emobella Engineering Nigeria Limited is an indigenous mechanical and electrical engineering service company with core competency in Metal Fabrication, Pipe Fitting and Welding, Instrumentation and Control, Pressure Vessel Inspection, Safety Valve Testing and Certification, and Plant Equipment Installation and Non-destructive Test of Vessel and Pipelines. We are a full-fledged professional engineering company located in the heart of Lagos State to provide services that meet all our clients’ engineering service needs at the same time, providing quality services while minimizing cost for our clients without compromising safety.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ogba, Lagos  
Job Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are a dynamic team specializing in Metal Fabrication, Piping, and Technical Procurement.
	We need an intelligent, proactive Sourcing Officer to help us manage supplier relationships, optimize costs, and ensure our projects are fueled by the best resources in the industry.


Requirements
What we are looking for:


	Education: B.Sc / HND in Procurement, Supply Chain, or Business Admin.
	Experience: 2–3 years in procurement, sourcing, or logistics.
	Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Excel and experience with ERP systems (SAP/Oracle).
	Location: Must be based in Ogba or environs (Lagos Mainland precisely).
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Project Manager Job at Emeraldzone Business Support Services




        
    

        
        Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client’s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager

Job Location: Ogun

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Project Manager is responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and closing projects in line with organizational goals, timelines, and budgets.
	The role ensures effective coordination of resources, stakeholders, and project teams to deliver successful outcomes.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's or Master's Degree with 5-8 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.
